text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can produce paintings in the style of famous artists, compose original music, and even write poems or news articles. Some people worry that AI will replace human artists. However, human creativity comes from personal experience, emotion, and intention—things a machine doesn't truly have. AI learns from existing data but cannot feel joy or sadness. Instead of replacing us, AI can be a powerful tool. It helps artists explore new ideas, musicians experiment with sounds, and writers overcome creative blocks. In the end, the most interesting art often combines human imagination with machine precision.
